name: Chorr Police
overview: Anthony is a thief who lives in the slums of Mumbai. He usually steals not for himself, but for other people. Because of which, he is known as the Robinhood Slumdog of Mumbai. Not that it matters who he steals for, since the police will try to catch him anyway. His constant battle to outwit Lovely Singh, and they both find themselves in adventures one after the other.
